title: Structural Shapley Values (Book Chapter 21)
abstract_nl: Structural Shapley Values: extending Shapley with Structural Importance SI_i(f), a measure of feature i's impact in the underlying data-generating process f, distinct from the predictor f̂.
key_contributions: Structural Importance SI_i(f) 形式化: linear |β_i|, nonlinear E_X[|∂f/∂X_i|]
区分 predictor f̂ 和 ground truth f
Open problem: 把 SI 升格为 axiom(SC 填补此空)

process_meta.[AH-HA]: H21 是 SC 的孵化器 —— Heskes 知道 SI 重要, 但没升格 axiom, 我们做这最后一步
